tree.notes: A song about loving sports and what different sports children can do, such as running, swimming, football, basketball, table tennis, and volleyball.
tree.explanation: 这首歌提到了打乒乓球(ping-pong)和排球(volleyball)，但没有提到网球(tennis)。

children.text: Running, Swimming and Jumping
children.notes: The first verse of the song focusing on run, swim, and jump.
children.statement: The singer can jump high and far.
children.explanation: 歌词中说：I can jump high and far (我会跳得高，跳得远)。

children.text: "Do you like playing sports?" "Yes, I do."
children.cn: “你喜欢做体育运动吗？”“是的，我喜欢。”
children.notes: Asking about sports preference.
children.statement: The singer dislikes sports.
children.explanation: 歌手喜欢运动(Yes, I do)。

children.text: "I can run and swim. I can jump high and far."
children.cn: “我会跑，也会游泳。我会跳得高，也跳得远。”
children.notes: Listing physical abilities.
children.statement: The singer can run but cannot swim.
children.explanation: 歌手表示会跑也会游泳(I can run and swim)。
children.highlight: run and, jump high, and far

children.text: "I like playing sports. What about you?"
children.cn: “我喜欢做体育运动。你呢？”
children.notes: Expressing like and asking others.
children.statement: The singer asks about the other person's age.
children.explanation: 歌手在问对方喜不喜欢运动(What about you?)。

children.text: Ball Games
children.notes: The second verse of the song focusing on ball games.
children.statement: The song mentions playing football.
children.explanation: 歌词提到了football(足球)和basketball(篮球)。

children.text: "I can play football and basketball. I can play ping-pong and volleyball."
children.cn: “我会踢足球、打篮球。我会打乒乓球、打排球。”
children.notes: Listing ball games abilities.
children.statement: The singer is unable to play table tennis.
children.explanation: 歌手会打乒乓球(I can play ping-pong)。

tree.notes: Daming learns to swim and shows off his other sports abilities.
tree.statement: Daming can swim at the beginning.
tree.explanation: 起初大明不会游泳(No, I can't)。

children.text: Daming's Existing Abilities
children.notes: Daming is asked if he can jump high, run fast, and play ping-pong. He can do all of these.
children.statement: Daming cannot play table tennis.
children.explanation: 大明表示会打乒乓球(Yes, I can)。

children.text: "Can you jump high, Daming?" "Yes, I can."
children.cn: “大明，你跳得高吗？”“是的，我会。”
children.speaker: Child
children.notes: Asking about jumping ability.
children.statement: Daming can jump high.
children.explanation: 大明说“Yes, I can”。

children.text: "Can you run fast?" "Yes, I can."
children.cn: “你能跑得快吗？”“是的，我会。”
children.speaker: Child
children.notes: Asking about running speed.
children.statement: Daming is slow at running.
children.explanation: 大明能跑得快(run fast)。

children.text: "Can you play ping-pong?" "Yes, I can."
children.cn: “你会打乒乓球吗？”“是的，我会。”
children.speaker: Child
children.notes: Asking about ping-pong.
children.statement: Daming likes ping-pong.
children.explanation: 大明会打乒乓球(Yes, I can)。

children.text: Daming Learns to Swim
children.notes: Daming cannot swim at first, but he learns and can soon swim fast.
children.statement: Daming refuses to learn swimming.
children.explanation: 大明说“但我能学(But I can learn)”。

children.text: "Can you swim?" "No, I can't. But I can learn."
children.cn: “你会游泳吗？”“不，我不会。但我能学。”
children.speaker: Child
children.notes: Asking about swimming. Daming cannot but is willing to learn.
children.statement: Daming knows how to swim at first.
children.explanation: 大明最开始不会游泳(No, I can't)。

children.text: "I can swim now." "Wow! You can swim fast!"
children.cn: “我现在会游泳了。”“哇！你游得真快！”
children.speaker: Daming
children.notes: Daming succeeds in learning and swims fast.
children.statement: Daming is bad at swimming after learning.
children.explanation: 别的小朋友夸他游得快(swim fast)。

tree.notes: The inspiring story of Terry Fox, who ran across Canada to raise money for cancer patients.
tree.statement: Terry Fox ran for personal fame.
tree.explanation: 特里是为了给癌症患者筹集资金(get money for people with cancer)。

children.text: Terry's Determination
children.notes: Terry lost his leg to cancer but decided to run to help others.
children.statement: Terry Fox lost one of his arms.
children.explanation: 他因为癌症失去了一条腿(lose one leg)。

children.text: I'm Terry Fox. I like running and playing basketball. But I lose one leg because of cancer.
children.cn: 我是特里·福克斯。我喜欢跑步和打篮球。但我因为癌症失去了一只腿。
children.speaker: Terry
children.notes: Introducing Terry and his challenge.
children.statement: Terry liked sports before his illness.
children.explanation: 他喜欢跑步和篮球(running and playing basketball)。

children.text: Can I help other people with cancer? I know! I can run across Canada. And I can get money for people!
children.cn: 我能帮助其他患有癌症的人吗？我知道了！我可以跑着穿过加拿大。而且我可以帮人们募捐！
children.speaker: Terry
children.notes: Terry decides to run across Canada for charity.
children.statement: Terry wanted to run across the USA.
children.explanation: 他想横穿加拿大(across Canada)。
children.highlight: help other, run across, get money

children.text: It's hard for me. Many kind people help me.
children.cn: 这对我来说很困难。许多善良的人帮助了我。
children.speaker: Terry
children.notes: It's a tough task but people support him.
children.statement: Nobody helped Terry on his run.
children.explanation: 许多善良的人帮助了他(Many kind people help me)。

children.text: The Run and Terry's Legacy
children.notes: Terry ran for five months but had to stop due to illness. People still do the run to remember him.
children.statement: Terry Fox ran for an entire year.
children.explanation: 他坚持跑了五个月(five months)。

children.text: I keep running for five months. But I'm very ill. I can't run anymore.
children.cn: 我坚持跑了五个月。但我病得很重。我不能再跑了。
children.speaker: Terry
children.notes: Terry had to stop the run.
children.statement: Terry stopped running because he was tired of it.
children.explanation: 他因为重病不得不停止(very ill. I can't run anymore)。

children.text: Now many people do the Terry Fox Run every year. Let's remember Terry with a run.
children.cn: 现在许多人每年都参加“特里·福克斯义跑”。让我们用义跑来纪念特里。
children.speaker: Terry
children.notes: His legacy lives on through the annual run.
children.statement: People do the run every week.
children.explanation: 人们每年进行纪念跑(every year)。

children.text: Come on, Terry! You can do it! Yes, I can do it!
children.cn: 加油，特里！你做得到的！是的，我做得到！
children.speaker: Crowd
children.notes: Encouraging quotes from the run.
children.statement: Terry didn't believe he could do it.
children.explanation: 特里坚信自己能行(Yes, I can do it!)。

tree.text: Fuel Up: Welcome to Sports Day!
tree.notes: A chant encouraging everyone to join Sports Day and try their best, reminding us that it is OK to fail.
tree.statement: Failing is unacceptable according to the chant.
tree.explanation: 歌谣里提到：失败也是可以接受的(It's OK to fail)。

children.text: Sports Day and Trying
children.notes: Encouraging sports participation regardless of results.
children.statement: You must run very fast to join Sports Day.
children.explanation: 歌谣中说：即使跑得不快，跳得不远也没关系(I can't run very fast... It's OK)。

children.text: Welcome to Sports Day! Sports Day! Sports Day! Come on, everybody!
children.cn: 欢迎来到运动会！运动会！运动会！加油，大家！
children.notes: Opening invitation.
children.statement: Sports Day is for select children only.
children.explanation: 歌谣欢迎每一个人(everybody)。

children.text: I can't run very fast. I can't jump very far. It's OK. It's OK. It's OK to fail.
children.cn: 我跑得不太快。我跳得不太远。没关系。没关系。失败也没关系。
children.notes: Accepting failure and minor limitations.
children.statement: The chant says it is bad to fail.
children.explanation: 歌谣说失败也没关系(It's OK to fail)。
children.highlight: can't, very fast, very far, OK to

children.text: Don't give up! Never stop! Work hard and try your best!
children.cn: 别放弃！永不停止！努力奋斗，尽力而为！
children.notes: Call to persistence and hard work.
children.statement: You should stop if you are not the best.
children.explanation: 歌谣建议“别放弃，永不停止”(Don't give up! Never stop!)。

tree.notes: Dialogue listing this year's sports stars: Wang Li (runs fast), Li Min (plays basketball well & jumps high), and Zhu Chen (swims fast).
tree.statement: Li Min can swim very fast.
tree.explanation: 游得快的是朱晨(Zhu Chen can swim very fast)；李敏擅长打篮球和跳高。

children.text: Sports Stars Profiling
children.notes: Introducing Wang Li, Li Min, and Zhu Chen's abilities.
children.statement: Zhu Chen is a basketball player.
children.explanation: 朱晨擅长游泳(swim)。

children.text: Look, they are this year's sports stars!
children.cn: 看，他们是今年的体育明星！
children.speaker: Teacher
children.notes: Teacher introduces the sports stars.
children.statement: They are music stars.
children.explanation: 他们是体育明星(sports stars)。

children.text: That is my friend, Wang Li. She can run very fast.
children.cn: 那是我的朋友王莉。她跑得非常快。
children.speaker: Wang Li's Friend
children.notes: Wang Li is good at running.
children.statement: Wang Li runs very slowly.
children.explanation: 王莉跑得很快(run very fast)。

children.text: And that is Li Min. He can play basketball very well. He can jump very high.
children.cn: 那是李明。他篮球打得非常好。他能跳得非常高。
children.speaker: Li Min's Friend
children.notes: Li Min plays basketball well and jumps high.
children.statement: Li Min can jump high.
children.explanation: 李明跳得很高(jump very high)。

children.text: Is that Zhu Chen? Yes, she can swim very fast.
children.cn: 那是朱晨吗？是的，她游泳游得非常快。
children.speaker: Zhu Chen's Friend
children.notes: Zhu Chen swims fast.
children.statement: Zhu Chen cannot swim.
children.explanation: 朱晨游得非常快(swim very fast)。

children.text: They're all good at sports and they all work very hard.
children.cn: 他们都擅长体育运动，而且都非常努力。
children.speaker: Teacher
children.notes: Teacher praises their attitude.
children.statement: The stars do not practice hard.
children.explanation: 他们练习非常刻苦(work very hard)。
